name: J-20 Mighty Dragon
description: China's fifth-generation stealth fighter optimized for long-range interception and air superiority over the Western Pacific. Features large internal fuel capacity and weapon bays.

specialAbilities.name: Long-Range Interceptor
specialAbilities.description: Optimized for engaging high-value targets like tankers and AWACS at extended range with PL-15 missiles.

specialAbilities.name: Type 1475 AESA Radar
specialAbilities.description: Advanced active electronically scanned array provides superior detection range and multi-target tracking.
